data.title: Currenc Group Appoints Wan Lung Eng as CFO
data.description:
The latest update is out from Currenc Group ( (CURR) ).

On April 15, 2025, CURRENC Group Inc. announced the appointment of Wan Lung Eng as its new Chief Financial Officer, effective April 16, 2025. Mr. Eng, who has over 20 years of experience in finance and accounting, previously served as CFO at VitalCheck Wellness and held financial leadership roles at Teclison and Spectral MD. His extensive expertise in corporate finance, mergers and acquisitions, and capital markets is expected to drive CURRENC’s financial strategy and growth initiatives. The company anticipates that Mr. Eng’s leadership will enhance its financial discipline and support its position as a leader in digital remittance and AI-powered financial solutions.

Spark’s Take on CURR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CURR is a Underperform.

Currency Group scores low primarily due to significant financial instability, including net losses and high leverage, which overshadow modest cash flow improvements. The technical analysis suggests potential bearish momentum, and the valuation is unattractive with a negative P/E ratio. These factors contribute to the low overall score.

To see Spark’s full report on CURR stock, click here.

More about Currenc Group

CURRENC Group Inc. is a fintech pioneer focused on transforming global financial services through artificial intelligence (AI). The company provides comprehensive AI solutions to financial institutions worldwide, including AI-powered call centers and agents, aimed at reducing costs, increasing efficiency, and enhancing customer satisfaction. Its digital remittance platform supports e-wallets and remittance companies, facilitating real-time global payment services and improving financial access for underserved communities.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Trustpilot Releases 2024 Annual Report and AGM Notice
data.description:
Trustpilot Group Plc ( (GB:TRST) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Trustpilot Group Plc has released its annual report and financial statements for the year ending December 31, 2024, along with the notice for its 2025 Annual General Meeting. These documents, which include essential regulatory information, have been made available to shareholders and are accessible via the National Storage Mechanism and the company’s website. This announcement underscores Trustpilot’s commitment to transparency and regulatory compliance, potentially impacting shareholder engagement and company governance.

More about Trustpilot Group Plc

Trustpilot Group Plc operates in the online review industry, providing a platform for consumers to share feedback on businesses and services. The company focuses on enhancing transparency and trust between consumers and businesses globally.

data.title: Turnium Technology Group Announces Strategic Private Placement Offerings
data.description:
Rmr Science Technologies ( (TSE:TTGI) ) has issued an update.

Turnium Technology Group Inc. announced a non-brokered private placement offering, consisting of up to 26,151,000 units at CAD$0.08 per unit, aiming to raise up to CAD$2,092,080. Additionally, the company plans a non-brokered private placement of unsecured convertible debentures for up to CAD$2,000,000. These offerings are intended to support general operations, including research and development, sales and marketing, and public company-related expenses. The initiatives reflect Turnium’s strategic efforts to enhance its financial position and operational capabilities.

More about Rmr Science Technologies

Turnium Technology Group Inc. is a global leader in Technology-as-a-Service (TaaS) and partner enablement services, including an AI-powered prospecting and lead generation platform.

data.title: Hays plc Executives Acquire Shares Following Dividend Reinvestment
data.description:
An announcement from Hays plc ( (GB:HAS) ) is now available.

Hays plc announced the acquisition of ordinary shares by its CFO, James Hilton, and Ajanta Hilton, a person closely associated with him. The transactions were conducted following the re-investment of dividends paid to shareholders on April 9, 2025, and took place on the London Stock Exchange. This move reflects internal confidence in the company’s performance and could signal positive expectations for future growth, potentially impacting stakeholder perceptions.

Spark’s Take on GB:HAS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:HAS is a Neutral.

Hays plc is currently facing financial challenges with declining revenue and profitability, impacting its valuation negatively. However, technical indicators show a positive short-term trend, and a recent director’s share purchase suggests confidence in the company’s future prospects. While the financial situation is stable, investors should be cautious due to the profitability issues.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:HAS stock, click here.

More about Hays plc

Hays plc operates in the recruitment and human resources industry, providing staffing and workforce solutions across various sectors. The company focuses on connecting employers with skilled professionals, offering services that cater to temporary, permanent, and contract employment needs.

data.title: Theratechnologies Evaluates Potential Sale Amid Future Pak Proposal
data.description:
Theratechnologies ( (TSE:TH) ) has issued an update.

On April 15, 2025, Theratechnologies Inc. announced that its Board of Directors is evaluating a potential sale of the company through an open and non-exclusive process. This decision follows a proposal from Future Pak, and the Board has authorized a special committee to oversee the process. The committee has engaged additional financial and legal advisors to support the evaluation. While discussions are ongoing, the company assures stakeholders that operations will continue as usual. However, there is no guarantee that these discussions will result in a transaction.

Spark’s Take on TSE:TH Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:TH is a Neutral.

Theratechnologies faces significant challenges with profitability and high financial leverage, which weigh heavily on the stock’s attractiveness. While there are noteworthy improvements in FDA approvals and strategic partnerships, these are overshadowed by financial and technical weaknesses. Investors should remain cautious and monitor ongoing operational adjustments and financial stability improvements.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:TH stock, click here.

More about Theratechnologies

Theratechnologies Inc. is a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the commercialization of innovative therapies that have the potential to redefine standards of care. The company is listed on the TSX and NASDAQ and is based in Montreal, Canada.

data.title: Ferretti S.p.A Announces Final Dividend for 2024
data.description:
Ferretti S.p.A. ( (IT:YACHT) ) has provided an update.

Ferretti S.p.A has announced a final ordinary dividend of EUR 0.1 per share for the financial year ending December 31, 2024, with the payment date set for June 18, 2025. The dividend will be subject to a 26% Italian withholding tax for non-Italian resident shareholders, who are advised to seek professional advice for potential tax refunds.

More about Ferretti S.p.A.

Ferretti S.p.A is a company involved in the luxury yacht manufacturing industry, known for producing high-end yachts and boats. The company focuses on delivering premium maritime experiences and holds a significant position in the luxury yacht market.

data.title: Intercos S.p.A. Announces 2024 Financial Results and New Incentive Plan
data.description:
Intercos S.p.A. ( (IT:ICOS) ) has shared an update.

Intercos S.p.A. held its Shareholders’ Meeting, approving the financial statements for 2024 and announcing a dividend distribution of Euro 0.197169 per share. data.title: Chunghwa Telecom Reports Financial Statement Discrepancies for 2024
data.description:
Chunghwa Telecom Co ( (CHT) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 16, 2025, Chunghwa Telecom Co., Ltd. announced differences in its consolidated financial statements for 2024 under Taiwan-IFRSs and IFRSs. The discrepancies mainly arise from the timing of income tax recognition on unappropriated earnings and the treatment of revenues from fixed-line connections and prepaid phone cards. These differences do not affect the company’s total equity, and the earnings distribution and stockholders’ equity matters remain in accordance with Taiwan-IFRSs.

Spark’s Take on CHT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CHT is a Outperform.

Chunghwa Telecom’s overall score reflects its strong financial foundation, positive earnings call results, and stable technical indicators. The company’s robust cash flow and strategic expansion in ICT and 5G offset valuation concerns. Minor declines in specific revenue areas were outweighed by the company’s overall growth and leadership.

To see Spark’s full report on CHT stock, click here.

More about Chunghwa Telecom Co

Chunghwa Telecom Co., Ltd. is a leading telecommunications company based in Taipei, Taiwan. It provides a wide range of services including fixed-line, mobile, and broadband internet services, primarily focusing on the Taiwanese market.

The meeting will address key agenda items including the approval of the annual report, financial statements, and tax compliance for the fiscal year 2024, as well as decisions on dividends, board appointments, and other corporate governance matters. This meeting is crucial for stakeholders as it will determine the company’s strategic direction and financial management for the upcoming year.
